title: Applied Machine Learning
description: Introduction to machine learning through Python based projects; machine learning tools; supervised and unsupervised learning algorithms and modeling accuracy, bias, and overfitting issues.

objectives: Establish a basic understanding of machine learning algorithms.
Establish an understanding of how to implement simple machine learning algorithms.
Establish an understanding of how to use the existing machine learning library and the end-to-end machine learning project workflow.
Establish an understanding of assessing the model performance and solving the basic program like overfitting.

textbook.title: Hands-On Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn, Keras, and TensorFlow (3rd Edition)
textbook.description: Hands-on reference covering practical ML workflows, model development, and evaluation in Python.

classSchedule.topic: Intro to ML, Python and Math Review
Special Topics on Advanced AI models
